summary: Redeployed the dedicated Social Media Management System Netlify staging-only site after the AG Digitalz First Content Sprint v1 merge.
notes: Executed only the owner-approved staging-only Netlify redeploy for the existing dedicated staging site. Source repo main was verified at c6dc28dee2f50324322c476cb0d4174f853e8d68 before deploy. Netlify returned deploy ready for deploy ID 6a49e480fbe8fbbb83b933dc and HTTP GET returned 200 for the primary staging URL. Netlify labels the deploy context as production because this is the primary deploy context of the dedicated staging-only site, not an AG Digitalz production domain, customer production domain, or production customer system. No DNS change, custom domain, paid feature, sensitive value storage, target repo edit, target PR merge during deploy, social account connection, credential use, posting, scheduling, DM/comment action, analytics API use, n8n activation, live form wiring, tracking script, private client data, production data, customer data, Lead Gen change, AI Receptionist change, or Constitution change occurred.
